title: Payment Incident Postmortem Template
content:
Payment Incident Postmortem Template

Schedule within 48 hours of Sev-1/Sev-2 resolution. Blameless culture — focus on systems and process.

1. Incident Summary
- Incident ID, dates/times (UTC), duration, severity, customer impact.

2. Timeline
- Detection, acknowledgment, escalation, mitigation, recovery, all-clear.

3. Root Cause Analysis
- Primary cause (e.g., database connection pool saturation).
- Contributing factors (peak load, config drift, missing alerts).

4. What Went Well
- Runbook steps that worked, comms timeliness, auto-scaling response.

5. What Went Wrong
- Detection gaps, escalation delays, tooling limitations.

6. Action Items
- Each item: owner, priority, due date, tracking ticket.
- Categories: immediate fixes, monitoring, runbook updates, capacity planning.

7. Lessons Learned
- Link to related docs: Payment Outage Runbook, Database Pool Tuning Guide, SLA Policy.

Example reference: INC-2024-0318 (March 2024 payment degradation) — root cause was connection pool exhaustion; actions included pool tuning and new pool utilization alerts.
